div.h1: Comprehensive POS Solutions for Your Business
div.p: Streamline sales, manage inventory, and provide a seamless checkout experience with our tailored POS solutions.

div.h2: Trusted POS Solutions That Drive Real Results Powered by Odoo

div.p: From retail counters to restaurant kitchens Creyox Technologies delivers cloud POS, mobile POS, and custom POS solutions that are fully integrated with Odoo. No data silos. No downtime. No guesswork. Our Odoo POS solutions help businesses manage billing, inventory, customer data, accounting, and multi-store operations from one centralized platform. Whether you run a single outlet or multiple locations, we build scalable POS systems designed to improve checkout speed, simplify daily operations, and support long-term business growth.

div.class: partner-image-box border-0 bg-transparent d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center

div.p: POS Implementations
Industries Served
Client Satisfaction Rate

div.h2: Is Your POS Holding You Back?

div.h3: Your POS crashes at peak hours
div.p: Our cloud POS solutions run on Odoo's resilient infrastructure with built-in offline mode every transaction is saved, always.

div.h3: Your POS doesn't talk to your inventory or accounts
div.p: We deliver POS integration services that connect your POS to Odoo inventory, accounting, CRM, and e-commerce natively, no middleware.

div.h3: You're paying enterprise prices for basic features
div.p: Our POS solutions for small business are right-sized full Odoo features, transparent pricing, and a team that actually picks up the phone.

Every business operates differently. Our industry-specific POS Services are designed around your real workflows, giving you a system that fits your operations instead of forcing you to adapt to generic software.
Billing, discounts, multi-variant products, barcode scanning, and customer loyalty all in one retail POS solution.
Table management, KOT printing, split bills, and kitchen display integration. Speed up service, reduce errors.
Appointment-linked billing, membership packages, therapist commissions, and product retail all in one view.
Pump-integrated billing, shift management, daily reconciliation, and credit customer tracking.
High-volume scanning, expiry tracking, GST-ready billing, and perishable inventory alerts.
Membership billing, class pass tracking, pro-shop sales, and auto-renewal invoicing.
Our POS platform is built on Odoo which means every feature is already connected to your inventory, accounts, and customers.
Sub-second transaction processing handles peak queues without a single hiccup.
Every sale instantly adjusts stock levels across all locations automatically.
Dashboards that show exactly what's selling, what's not, and where to act.
Track purchase history, run loyalty point programs, and trigger targeted offers.
Run your POS from any tablet or smartphone perfect for pop-ups, events, and floor sales.
UPI, card, wallet, and cash all payment gateways in one POS payment solution.
Unify in-store, online, and mobile sales with a single Odoo backend.
Keep selling even when the internet goes down. Transactions sync automatically when reconnected.
Assign access levels, track cashier performance, and review shift summaries per staff.
Set up time-based offers, combo deals, and loyalty campaigns in minutes no developer needed.

End-to-End POS Services From First Install to Long-Term Scale. Whether you need a fresh POS installation, a complex system integration, or ongoing maintenance we have a clearly scoped service for exactly where you are right now.
Connect your POS to inventory, accounting, e-commerce, and third-party tools through Odoo's unified backend. No manual data entry, ever again.
When off-the-shelf doesn't fit your workflow, we build it. Custom receipt formats, loyalty engines, industry-specific POS modules, and bespoke reporting.
Proactive support and scheduled health checks so your POS never becomes the bottleneck in your business.
Move your POS to the cloud with Odoo.sh or Odoo Online access live sales data from anywhere, on any device.
Take your checkout anywhere: tablets at restaurant tables, phones at trade events, or roaming staff on the shop floor.

div.h2:
We're Odoo Partners:
Integration Is Our Core, Not an Add-On
div.p: Most POS providers treat integrations as costly bolt-ons. As certified Odoo partners, Creyox builds POS solutions where every module—inventory, accounting, CRM, HR—is already connected out of the box. No middleware, no manual reconciliation, no data entry nightmares.
Every sale auto-deducts stock in real time across all Odoo locations—no stock adjustments needed.
Sales journals, payment entries, and GST reports are generated automatically with zero manual bookkeeping.
Customer purchase data flows directly into Odoo CRM for upselling, loyalty, and retention campaigns.
One product catalogue, one price list—consistent across your physical store and your website.
POS, inventory, accounting, CRM—one Odoo login manages everything across your enterprise.
Full software deployment flexibility—your data, your chosen environment, your control.
Odoo connects natively to payment gateways, logistics platforms, and marketplaces.
Add new POS sessions, locations, and users through configuration—no new system required.

div.h2: How We Deploy Your Odoo POS
div.p: No Surprises, No Delays
We study your workflows, existing software tools, and business rules before recommending any Odoo POS configuration.
A detailed Odoo POS software plan modules, integrations, custom requirements, and user workflows documented clearly.
We configure Odoo POS, build any custom modules, and test thoroughly against your real products, taxes, and payment flows.
Live software training for your team plus a user acceptance phase your staff are fully confident.
Remote go-live support, followed by dedicated POS maintenance services, Odoo version management.

div.h2: Our Own Odoo POS Software Extensions
div.p: We build and maintain our own Odoo POS software apps available on the Odoo App Store and fully installed, configured, and supported by our team as part of your POS service engagement.

A flexible receipt design solution for Odoo POS that allows businesses to choose professional POS receipt templates from predefined options. Users can easily add or remove specific sections from the receipt layout by editing the template from the front end.

div.h3: All in One POS Printing Solution
div.p: A module that allows users to configure multiple printers for kitchen or payment receipts in Odoo, whether their system is hosted on the cloud, Odoo.sh, or locally (on-premise). No hidden costs—unlimited printers and printouts.

img.alt: All in One POS Printing Solution

div.p: A powerful Stripe terminal integration for Odoo POS that enables secure, real-time card payments directly from your POS system. This connector creates a bi-directional connection between Odoo POS and Stripe payment terminals, allowing transactions to be processed instantly while synchronizing payment status back to Odoo.

div.h2: Ready to Upgrade Your POS Experience? 🚀
